executives.name: Ted Pick
executives.background: Mr. Pick has served as Chief Executive Officer of Morgan Stanley since January 2024. He was previously Co-President of the Firm from 2021 to 2023 and Head of the Institutional Securities Group. He joined Morgan Stanley in 1990.

executives.name: Sharon Yeshaya
executives.background: Ms. Yeshaya has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since June 2021. She previously served as Head of Investor Relations.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: James Gorman
executives.background: Mr. Gorman is the Executive Chairman of Morgan Stanley. He served as Chief Executive Officer from 2010 through 2023. He joined the Firm in 2006.

executives.name: Dan Simkowitz
executives.background: Mr. Simkowitz has served as Co-President of Morgan Stanley since January 2024 and Head of Institutional Securities. He was previously Head of Investment Management.

executives.name: Andy Saperstein
executives.background: Mr. Saperstein has served as Co-President of Morgan Stanley since January 2024 and Head of Wealth Management.

board_of_directors.name: James Gorman
board_of_directors.background: Executive Chairman of Morgan Stanley. Former CEO.

board_of_directors.name: Thomas Glocer
board_of_directors.background: Former CEO of Thomson Reuters Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Mary Schapiro
board_of_directors.background: Former Chair of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.

board_of_directors.name: Stephen Luczo
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Seagate Technology.

board_of_directors.name: Erika James
board_of_directors.background: Dean of the Wharton School of the University of Pennsylvania.
committees: Compensation, Management Development and Succession Committee

sources.source_description: Morgan Stanley Official Website - Executive Officers
